definition:
ὑπό-δειγμα, -τος, τό
 (ὑποδείκνυμι), [in LXX: Eze.42:15, Sir.44:16, 2Ma.6:28 2Mac 6:31, 4Ma.17:23 * ;] 
used by later writers (Xen. onwards) for παράδειγμα (see Rutherford, NPhr., 62), 
   (a) a figure, copy: Heb.8:5 9:23; 
   (b) an example: for imitation, Jhn.13:15, Jas.5:10; for warning, Heb.4:11, 2Pe.2:6.†
 SYN.: ὁμοίωμα, τύπος, ὑποτύπωσις (see DB, iii. 696b)  (AS)
